title: Implement hardware layer tests (whole machine testing)
description: Implement the hardware layer test module for whole machine testing including: power management tests, boot sequence validation, stress testing, performance benchmarks, and thermal monitoring. This layer tests the server as a complete system.

criteria: Power cycling tests can execute via IPMI or hardware API and validate system state transitions
Boot sequence tests verify BIOS POST, bootloader, and OS initialization in correct order
Stress tests (CPU, memory, IO) can run with configurable duration and intensity parameters
Thermal monitoring tests validate fan speeds and temperature readings across all sensors
Performance benchmarks produce comparable metrics across test runs
convergence.verification: Run pytest tests/hardware/ -v and verify all hardware layer tests execute against mock or real hardware

files.target: Stress testing module (CPU, memory, IO stress)
Thermal monitoring and fan control tests
Pytest configuration with hardware layer fixtures

implementation: Create HardwareLayer class implementing LayerProtocol with setup/execute/teardown methods
Implement PowerTests: power_cycle (on/off/on), power_state (on/off/standby), power_redundancy (dual PSU failover)
Implement BootTests: bios_post_check, bootloader_verification, os_boot_timeout, boot_device_order
Implement StressTests: cpu_stress (configurable cores/duration), memory_stress (memory fill + access), io_stress (disk IOPS)
Implement ThermalTests: fan_speed_validation, temperature_sensor_reading, thermal_throttle_detection, cooling_efficiency
Implement PerformanceTests: cpu_benchmark, memory_bandwidth, disk_throughput, network_latency
Create HardwareApi abstract interface for IPMI/Redfish/hardware vendor SDK integration
Implement mock HardwareApi for testing without real hardware
Write comprehensive unit tests for each module using mock hardware API
Add hardware-specific pytest fixtures: ipmi_connection, hardware_sensors, power_controller

success_metrics: tests run with mock hardware API
